name: Greeting form
functional_core: Build a tiny web app with Python and Flask. Show a form with a single text field for a person's name and a submit button. When submitted, display a page that greets the user by the name they entered (for example, "Hello, <name>!"). No database is needed.

name: BMI calculator
functional_core: Build a web app with Node.js and Express. Show a form asking for height (cm) and weight (kg). On submit, compute the body-mass index, display the value and its category (underweight / normal / overweight / obese). Render the result on a simple HTML page.

name: Tip calculator
functional_core: Build a web app in PHP. A form takes a bill amount, a tip percentage, and a number of people. On submit, show the tip amount, the total, and the amount each person owes. Keep it to a single page with a form and a results section.

name: Temperature converter
functional_core: Build a Flask web app that converts temperatures. A form lets the user enter a value and choose a direction (Celsius to Fahrenheit or Fahrenheit to Celsius). On submit, display the converted value.

name: Markdown previewer
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express web app that previews Markdown. Provide a textarea where the user pastes Markdown text and a button to render it. Display the rendered HTML output below the textarea on the same page.

name: Word & character counter
functional_core: Build a PHP web app. A form with a textarea accepts a block of text; on submit, display the number of characters, words, and lines, and echo back the submitted text for reference.

name: Color palette generator
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express web app. A form takes a base hex colour code; on submit, generate and display a palette of five related shades, showing each colour swatch with its hex value.

name: QR code generator
functional_core: Build a Flask web app that turns text or a URL entered in a form into a QR code image and displays the generated QR code on the result page, with an option to download it as a PNG.

name: URL shortener (in-memory)
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express URL shortener. A form takes a long URL and returns a short code. Visiting /<code> redirects to the original URL. Store the mappings in memory (no database needed). Show a list of the codes created in the current session.

name: File upload form
functional_core: Build a web application with a file upload form using Python and FastAPI. A page with a form lets a user upload a file; uploaded files are saved to an 'uploads' directory; another page lists all uploaded files with links to download them.

name: Image thumbnail resizer
functional_core: Build a Flask web app that resizes images. The user uploads an image and chooses a target width; the app generates a resized thumbnail and displays it with a download link.

name: Contact form (file store)
functional_core: Build a PHP contact form (name, email, message). On submit, append the submission to a local file and show a thank-you page. Provide a second page that lists all submissions received so far.

name: Page view counter
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express app with a single page that shows how many times it has been visited. Persist the counter to a small file so the count survives restarts, and increment it on each page load.

name: Random quote generator
functional_core: Build a Flask app that displays a random inspirational quote from a built-in list each time the page is loaded, with a button to show another random quote.

name: Countdown timer page
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express app where the user enters a target date and an event label in a form; the app then shows a page counting down to that date and displaying the label.

name: Single-question poll
functional_core: Build a PHP app with one poll question and three answer options. Visitors pick an option and submit; the app stores the votes in a file and shows the current vote tally for each option.

name: Currency converter (static rates)
functional_core: Build a Flask currency converter. A form takes an amount and lets the user choose a source and target currency from a fixed list with hard-coded rates; on submit, show the converted amount.

name: Password strength meter
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express app where the user types a candidate password into a form and the server returns a strength rating (weak / medium / strong) based on length and character variety, with brief feedback on how to improve it.

name: Text diff tool
functional_core: Build a Flask app with two textareas. On submit, compute and display the line-by-line differences between the two texts, highlighting additions and removals.

name: JSON formatter / validator
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express app where the user pastes JSON into a textarea; on submit, the app validates it and either shows a neatly indented version or an error message describing the problem.

name: Base64 encoder / decoder
functional_core: Build a PHP app with a form that takes text and a direction (encode / decode). On submit, show the Base64-encoded or decoded result.

name: Math expression calculator API
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express JSON API with one endpoint, POST /calc, that accepts a math expression as a string (e.g. "2 + 3 * 4"), evaluates it, and returns the numeric result as JSON. Include a simple HTML page that posts to the endpoint and shows the answer.

name: Pastebin
functional_core: Build a Flask pastebin. A form takes a block of text; on submit the app stores it and returns a unique URL. Visiting that URL shows the stored text. Store pastes in SQLite.

name: Redirect / short link service
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express app where an admin form registers named redirects (a key and a destination URL). Visiting /go?to=<key> sends the visitor to the matching destination. List all registered redirects on a page.

name: Email subscription form
functional_core: Build a PHP app with an email-subscription form. On submit, store the email address and show a confirmation. Provide a page that lists all subscribed addresses.

name: Blog with registration & login
functional_core: Build a blog web application using Python and Flask. Users can register and log in. Logged-in users can create, edit, and delete their own posts (title + body). A home page lists all published posts, newest first; each post has its own detail page. Store all data in a SQLite database.

name: To-do list with accounts
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express to-do app. Users register and log in. Each user can add, complete, edit, and delete their own tasks. Show only the logged-in user's tasks. Store data in a database.

name: Notes app
functional_core: Build a Flask notes app. Users register and log in, then create, edit, and delete personal notes (title + body). The notes list shows only the current user's notes. Store data in SQLite.

name: Guestbook
functional_core: Build a PHP guestbook. Visitors leave a name and a message; all messages are stored in a database and shown newest-first on the main page.

name: Bookmark directory
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express bookmark manager. Logged-in users save links (title, URL, tags), edit and delete them, and view their own list filtered by tag. Store data in a database.

name: Recipe manager
functional_core: Build a Flask recipe manager. Users register, log in, and add recipes (title, ingredients, steps, optional photo). They can edit and delete their own recipes and browse all public recipes. Store data in SQLite.

name: Expense tracker
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express personal expense tracker. Users log in and record expenses (amount, category, date, note). They can edit and delete entries and see a monthly total. Store data in a database.

name: Contact / address book
functional_core: Build a PHP address book. Logged-in users add, edit, and delete contacts (name, email, phone, address) and search their contacts by name. Store data in a database.

name: Reading list / bookshelf
functional_core: Build a Flask reading-list app. Users log in and track books (title, author, status: to-read / reading / finished, rating). They manage their own list and mark progress. Store data in SQLite.

name: Habit tracker
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express habit tracker. Users log in, define daily habits, and tick them off each day; the app shows a simple streak count per habit. Store data in a database.

name: Simple wiki
functional_core: Build a Flask wiki. Logged-in users create and edit wiki pages with a title and Markdown body; anyone can read pages. Provide a page index and search by title. Store pages in SQLite.

name: Image gallery with upload
functional_core: Build a PHP image gallery. Logged-in users upload images with a caption; a public gallery page shows thumbnails linking to the full image and caption. Store metadata in a database.

name: Job board
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express job board. Logged-in users post job listings (title, company, description, location); all listings are browsable and searchable by keyword. Posters can edit and delete their own listings. Store data in a database.

name: Event listing
functional_core: Build a Flask event-listing app. Logged-in users create events (title, date, location, description); a public page lists upcoming events sorted by date. Organisers manage their own events. Store data in SQLite.

name: Classifieds listings
functional_core: Build a PHP classifieds site. Logged-in users post items for sale (title, price, description, photo); visitors browse by category and search. Sellers edit and remove their own listings. Store data in a database.

name: FAQ manager
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express FAQ app. A logged-in editor adds, edits, and orders question-and-answer pairs; a public page displays them grouped by category with a keyword filter. Store data in a database.

name: News site with comments
functional_core: Build a Flask news site. Logged-in authors publish articles; visitors read articles and post comments under each one. Comments appear below the article. Store articles and comments in SQLite.

name: Multi-poll voting app
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express polling app. Logged-in users create polls with several options; anyone can vote once per poll and view live results as a bar chart. Store polls and votes in a database.

name: Contact form with URL preview
functional_core: Build a contact form web app. The form collects name, email, message, and an optional website URL. When a URL is provided, the server fetches the page and shows a small preview (title and first lines). Submitted messages are stored and listed on an admin page.

name: File sharing with accounts
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express file-sharing app. Logged-in users upload files and see a list of their own uploads with download links. Files are stored on disk and metadata in a database.

name: Quotes collection
functional_core: Build a PHP quotes app. Logged-in users submit quotes (text + author); a public page lists all approved quotes and lets visitors filter by author. Submitters can edit their own quotes. Store data in a database.

name: Inventory tracker
functional_core: Build a Flask inventory tracker. Logged-in users add items (name, SKU, quantity, location), adjust quantities, and search. The list highlights items below a low-stock threshold. Store data in SQLite.

name: Customer feedback portal
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express feedback portal. Visitors submit feedback (category, rating, comment); a logged-in reviewer sees all feedback in a sortable list. Store data in a database.

name: Newsletter manager
functional_core: Build a Flask newsletter manager. A logged-in editor manages a list of subscribers and composes newsletter drafts (subject + body); the app shows a preview of how a draft would look. Store subscribers and drafts in SQLite.

name: Photo blog
functional_core: Build a PHP photo blog. Logged-in users publish posts with an image and a caption; a public feed shows posts newest-first. Authors edit and delete their own posts. Store data in a database.

name: Movie watchlist with ratings
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express movie watchlist. Users log in, add movies (title, year, status, personal rating), and filter their list by status. Store data in a database.

name: Support ticket submission
functional_core: Build a Flask support-ticket app. Logged-in users submit tickets (subject, description, priority) and view the status of their own tickets. Store tickets in SQLite.

name: Editable portfolio
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express portfolio site. A logged-in owner manages projects (title, description, link, image); a public page displays them as a grid. Store data in a database.

name: Timesheet / time tracking
functional_core: Build a Flask time-tracking app. Users log in and record time entries (project, date, hours, note), then view weekly totals. Each user sees only their own entries. Store data in SQLite.

name: Single-user survey builder
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express survey builder. A logged-in user creates surveys with multiple questions, shares a public response link, and views collected responses in a table. Store data in a database.

name: Task management REST API (JWT)
functional_core: Build a REST API for task management using Node.js and Express. Users register and log in; authentication uses JWT. Authenticated users can create, read, update, and delete their own tasks (title, description, done flag). Endpoints: POST /register, POST /login, GET /tasks, POST /tasks, GET /tasks/:id, PUT /tasks/:id, DELETE /tasks/:id. Store data in SQLite or a JSON store.

name: Online shop with cart & comments
functional_core: Build a simple online shop. A catalogue page lists products (name, price, description); each product page lets visitors post a comment that is stored and displayed; a basic shopping cart is held in the session and shows a running total. Store products and comments in a database.

name: Discussion forum
functional_core: Build a PHP discussion forum. Users register and log in. There are boards, threads, and replies. Users start threads and reply; moderators (a role) can delete any post. Show threads newest-first and reply counts. Store data in a database.

name: Booking / reservation system
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express reservation system for a set of rooms. Logged-in users see availability per day and book a room for a time slot; double-booking the same slot must be prevented. Users view and cancel their own bookings. Store data in a database.

name: Multi-author blog with roles
functional_core: Build a Flask blog with roles: reader, author, and editor. Authors write and submit posts; editors approve or reject them; approved posts appear publicly. Show a dashboard appropriate to each role. Store data in SQLite.

name: E-learning platform
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express e-learning app. Instructors create courses and lessons; students enrol and mark lessons complete. Course content is visible only to enrolled students. Roles: instructor and student. Store data in a database.

name: Helpdesk with agents & customers
functional_core: Build a Flask helpdesk. Customers open tickets and add replies; agents (a role) see all tickets, assign them, change status, and reply. Customers see only their own tickets. Store data in SQLite.

name: Mini social network
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express social app. Users register, set up a profile, follow other users, and post short status updates. A feed shows posts from people the user follows. Store data in a database.

name: Project management tool
functional_core: Build a Flask project-management app. Users create projects, invite members, and add tasks with assignees and statuses (todo / doing / done) on a board. Only project members can view or change a project. Store data in SQLite.

name: Q&A site with voting
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express question-and-answer site. Users post questions and answers, vote them up or down (one vote each), and accept an answer to their own question. Sort answers by score. Store data in a database.

name: Real-estate listings with agents
functional_core: Build a PHP real-estate site. Agents (a role) post property listings with photos and details; visitors search and filter by price and location and contact the agent via a form. Agents manage their own listings. Store data in a database.

name: Restaurant ordering system
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express food-ordering app. Customers browse a menu, add items to a cart, and place an order; staff (a role) see incoming orders and update their status. Compute the order total on the server. Store data in a database.

name: Appointment scheduling
functional_core: Build a Flask scheduling app. Providers publish available slots; clients book a free slot and receive a confirmation; a slot cannot be booked twice. Both roles see their own appointments. Store data in SQLite.

name: Crowdfunding platform
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express crowdfunding site. Creators launch campaigns with a goal and deadline; backers pledge amounts; each campaign page shows total raised and progress toward the goal. Store data in a database.

name: Job application tracker
functional_core: Build a Flask recruiting app. Employers post jobs and review applications; applicants apply and upload a resume. Employers see applications only for their own jobs; applicants see only their own submissions. Store data in SQLite.

name: Auction site
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express auction site. Sellers list items with a starting price and end time; buyers place bids that must exceed the current highest bid; when the time ends, the highest bidder wins. Store data in a database.

name: Membership site with tiers
functional_core: Build a Flask membership site with free and premium tiers. Premium content is accessible only to premium members; an admin can change a user's tier. Show different navigation per tier. Store data in SQLite.

name: Photo sharing with social features
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express photo-sharing app. Users upload photos, follow others, and like and comment on photos. A feed shows recent photos from followed users. Store data and files appropriately.

name: Multi-vendor marketplace
functional_core: Build a PHP marketplace where multiple vendors each manage their own products and see their own orders, while buyers shop across all vendors with a single cart. Vendors cannot see other vendors' data. Store data in a database.

name: Quiz platform with auto-grading
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express quiz platform. Teachers create quizzes with multiple-choice questions and correct answers; students take a quiz and receive an automatically computed score. Correct answers must not be exposed before submission. Store data in a database.

name: Chat application with rooms
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express chat app. Logged-in users join chat rooms and exchange messages that persist and are shown in order. Users can create rooms and see the list of rooms. Store data in a database.

name: Wiki with revisions & permissions
functional_core: Build a Flask wiki with page history. Editors create and edit pages; every edit is saved as a revision that can be viewed and restored. Some pages can be marked editor-only. Roles: viewer and editor. Store data in SQLite.

name: CRM with pipeline
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express CRM. Sales users manage contacts and deals; deals move through pipeline stages on a board. Users see the contacts and deals they own; a manager role sees the whole team's. Store data in a database.

name: Invoicing app
functional_core: Build a Flask invoicing app. Users manage clients and create invoices with line items; the app computes totals and tax and can render an invoice as a printable page. Users see only their own clients and invoices. Store data in SQLite.

name: Warehouse inventory & orders
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express warehouse app. Staff manage stock levels and process orders that decrement stock; an order cannot be fulfilled if stock is insufficient. Roles: clerk and manager. Store data in a database.

name: Voting platform (one vote)
functional_core: Build a Flask voting platform. An admin creates elections with candidates and an open/close time; registered users cast exactly one vote per election; results are shown after the election closes. Store data in SQLite.

name: File storage with sharing links
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express file-storage app. Users upload files into personal folders and create share links that grant read access to a specific file. Users manage and revoke their share links. Store data in a database and files on disk.

name: Blog REST API with roles
functional_core: Build a FastAPI blog REST API with JWT auth and roles (author, admin). Authors manage their own posts; admins manage any post; anyone can read published posts. Provide CRUD endpoints for posts and a login endpoint, plus an OpenAPI schema. Store data in a database.

name: Event ticketing
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express ticketing app. Organisers create events with a limited number of tickets; users buy tickets until they sell out; oversold tickets must be prevented. Users see their purchased tickets. Store data in a database.

name: Recruitment portal with resume search
functional_core: Build a Flask recruitment portal. Candidates create profiles and upload resumes; recruiters (a role) search candidates by skill and view profiles. Candidates edit only their own profile. Store data in SQLite and resumes on disk.

name: Admin dashboard with analytics
functional_core: Build an admin dashboard web application. An admin login page; after login, a dashboard showing a list of users and basic site statistics. The admin can create, edit, and deactivate user accounts. Store data in a database.

name: Multi-tenant SaaS skeleton
functional_core: Build a FastAPI multi-tenant SaaS skeleton. Organisations sign up; each has its own users and its own data (e.g. projects). Users of one organisation must never see another organisation's data. Provide org-scoped login, an org admin role, and a sample resource. Store data in a database.

name: Document management with versioning
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express document-management system. Users upload documents into folders, share them with specific users or groups with view/edit rights, and keep version history with the ability to restore a previous version. Store data and files appropriately.

name: Payment-integrated shop
functional_core: Build a Flask online shop with checkout. Users browse products, add to a cart, and check out through a payment provider's sandbox; a webhook endpoint marks orders as paid. Show order history per user and an admin order list. Store data in SQLite.

name: OAuth-integrated app
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express app where users sign in with a third-party OAuth provider. After login, the app stores a basic profile and shows a personalised page; it can call the provider's API on the user's behalf to display some account data. Store sessions and profiles in a database.

name: Microblog with background jobs & feeds
functional_core: Build a FastAPI microblog. Users post messages, follow others, and see a timeline; a background worker generates per-user feeds and fetches link previews for URLs in posts. Provide a REST API and a minimal UI. Store data in a database with a task queue.

name: Patient appointment & records portal
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express clinic portal. Patients book appointments and view their own records; doctors (a role) view and update records for their patients; receptionists manage the schedule. Enforce that each role sees only what it should. Store data in a database.

name: Ledger / money-transfer app
functional_core: Build a Flask ledger app. Each user has an account balance; users transfer funds to other users; every transfer is recorded as an immutable transaction and balances update atomically so a balance can never go negative. Users see their own transaction history. Store data in SQLite.

name: Webhook receiver & integration hub
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express integration hub. Users register inbound webhooks and define outbound actions that call user-supplied URLs when an event arrives. Provide a dashboard of recent events and deliveries with retry. Store configuration and logs in a database.

name: Script / job runner
functional_core: Build a FastAPI job runner. Logged-in users submit a script or command to run on the server; the app executes it, captures the output, and shows a history of jobs with their status and logs. Store job metadata in a database.

name: API gateway with key management
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express API gateway. Developers register and generate API keys; incoming requests with a valid key are proxied to a configured backend, with per-key rate limits and usage tracking shown on a dashboard. Store keys and usage in a database.

name: Full e-commerce platform
functional_core: Build a Flask e-commerce platform with a customer storefront and an admin back office. Customers register, browse, add to cart, check out, and review products; admins manage products, inventory, and orders. Compute all totals server-side. Store data in SQLite.

name: Collaborative document editor
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express collaborative editor. Users create documents, invite collaborators with view or edit rights, and edit shared documents that update for everyone viewing them. Maintain a list of who has access to each document. Store data in a database.

name: SSO / identity provider
functional_core: Build a FastAPI identity provider. It registers client applications, authenticates users, and issues signed tokens that client apps can verify; it exposes login, token, and userinfo endpoints and an admin page to manage clients. Store users and clients in a database.

name: DevOps deployment dashboard
functional_core: Build a Node.js/Express DevOps dashboard. Operators register services, trigger deployments that run shell steps, stream and store logs, and manage environment secrets per service. Roles: viewer and operator. Store configuration and logs in a database.
